summary: Audience recording with superb sound captures what many consider the best summer‑tour show.
review: The audience tape is praised for its crystal‑clear, lively mix – described as the best‑sounding crowd recording of the tour. Reviewers also claim this concert may have been the highlight of the summer run, despite a few mislabeled tracks and the absence of an encore.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review, but it rates both performance (5★) and recording quality very highly, leading to a near‑top overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, vibrant crowd mix; reviewer calls it the best‑sounding audience tape despite some mislabeled track titles.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall flow praised as possibly the best show of the summer tour; no encore is present.
